Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: costume components [300212998], components by specific context [300241584], components (objects parts) [300241583], Components (hierarchy name) [300241490], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Thin strips, as of whalebone, steel, or wood, worn in front of a corset or stays for stiffening.

Source.Source_ID: 2000030201/National Museum of American History, Dictionary of Costume (n.d.)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Dunne latjes van bijvoorbeeld balein, staal of hout, die middenvoor in een korset of keurslijf werden gedragen om het te verstevigen.

Source.Source_ID: 2000030201/National Museum of American History, Dictionary of Costume (n.d.)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: 由鯨骨、鋼絲或木質細條組成，穿於束腹外側，使體態保持挺立。
Dünner Stab, aus Fischbein, Stahl oder Holz, der zur Versteifung an der Vorderseite eines Korsetts oder Mieders getragen wird.

Source.Source_ID: 2000030201/National Museum of American History, Dictionary of Costume (n.d.)
